description: These nike LunarFly sports shoes are designed for those who Live to Run. These light weight shoes are ultra light, They are ideal for walking & sport running. These authentic nike shoes are durable and perfect for Sports, fitness enthusiasts to use indoors at the sports club and outdoors.Upper Leather and mesh upper for lightweight breathability Lushly padded tongue and collar for snug Fit Central lacing for customised comfortable fit Mesh tongue with textile lined collar for comfort Midsole Lunarlon technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy return Dynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronation Cuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfoot Outsole BRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durability EPR forefoot for multi-surface traction Waffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioning shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
